raw:
## Completed
Implemented `extensions/AskUserQuestion/` with the exact `AskUserQuestion` tool, schema, interactive `ctx.ui.custom` dialog, pure selection logic, headless fallback, and unit test.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - registers the tool, renders sequential dialogs, handles notes, returns structured results.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/logic.ts` - pure exported selection/result logic.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh` - terminal-free unit tests for single/multi selection, notes, and headless fallback.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh`

## Notes
Uses pi UI primitives cited in code: `ctx.ui.custom`, plus `Container`, `Text`, and `Input` from `@earendil-works/pi-tui`.
